meta.title: this sound does not exist (making music with HarmonAI)
meta.description:
Tired of the same music again and again? Here is something new.
The computer explains how to generate music with HarmonAI.

Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer

check
http://thissounddoesnotexist.org/

The tools the computer use to create the movie:
HarmonAI:
https://www.harmonai.org/
Stable Diffusion:
https://stability.ai/blog/stable-diffusion-public-release
Open A.I. GPT-3 playground:
https://beta.openai.com/playground
Open A.I. Jukebox
https://openai.com/blog/jukebox/

watch the prompt video
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RUatYr6PZdo&t=2s


C O N T A C T:
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com

Chapters:
0:00 Introduction 
0:37 What is HarmonAI?
1:15 Its like Stable Diffusion but with audio?
1:45 What is the difference with Open A.I. Jukebox?
2:27 Generate your own sample with HarmonAI
3:29 The models
4:50 Generate samples
5:56 Make a beat with a sample
6:56 this sound does not exist the webpage
7:20 Train your own model
8:27 This drum solo does not exist
